final:
module top_module(
    input in1,
    input in2,
    input reset,
    output reg out1
);always @(*) begin
    if (reset) begin
        out1 <= 1'b0;
    end else begin
        out1 <= in1 ^ in2;
    end
end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      out1 <= ~in1 & ~in2;
    end
  end

endmodule
